commands.name: to-resx
commands.description: Generates resource (.resx) files from all localisations in the target project.

options.name: output
options.description:
The path to output the resource files into.
By default, the .resx files are output alongside their .cs counterparts.

commands.name: from-php
commands.description: Converts localisations from the target osu!web directory into the target project.

arguments.name: project-file
arguments.description: The target C# project (.csproj) file to place the localisations in.
